sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2414" key="ai(mati/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἱμᾰτία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n2414.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blood-broth</tr_>, eaten at Sparta, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.57</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
